meta.ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, Department of Administrative Reforms & Public Grievances
meta.project_subject: Extension of NeSDA Way Forward PMU from 01.04.2025 to 31.3.2026
meta.deliverables: Generation of NeSDA Way Forward monthly reports focusing on unified e-service delivery portals, offline to e-service conversion, faceless mandatory e-services, and suo-moto e-service delivery; monitoring and updating the NeSDA Way Forward Dashboard using States/UTs inputs; identifying bottlenecks and sharing best practices; organizing meetings and brainstorming with State Governments and RTS officers; facilitating National e-Governance Webinars (NeGW); and providing handholding and query resolution for SPoCs, RTS officers, NIC, and speakers.

content.full_text: The Department of Administrative Reforms & Public Grievances (DARPG) extends the Quality Council of India (QCI) Project Management Unit (PMU) supporting the NeSDA 2021 recommendations for one year from 1 April 2025 to 31 March 2026. The three-member PMU will generate monthly NeSDA Way Forward reports, maintain the dashboard, identify implementation bottlenecks, disseminate best practices, convene stakeholder meetings, facilitate national webinars, and provide continuous handholding. Total cost is Rs 65,52,000 plus GST, payable monthly on actual man-days at Rs 7,500 per professional day. DARPG may terminate services at any time for unsatisfactory performance.
